entries.title: Lisbon Vintage Tram Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an emotional smartphone-style travel photograph of Lisbon in warm late-afternoon sunlight, showing exactly 2 vintage yellow-and-red street trams stopped side by side on curved tram tracks in a busy European street. The left tram is cropped close in the foreground with wooden window frames, a red side panel carrying a visible Coca-Cola advertisement, a small route sign reading "08," and passengers partially visible through reflective windows. The right tram is slightly farther back, angled toward the viewer, with the number "56" near the roof, open doors and windows, passengers inside, and a beverage advertisement on the red lower panel. Include urban background details such as parked cars, leafy trees, bright building facades, hard shadows on asphalt, metal rails, and a candid street-photography feel. Apply high-contrast cinematic color grading, deep blacks, golden highlights, realistic lens reflections, and a nostalgic travel-poster mood. Overlay large centered white handwritten brush-script text reading Lisbon across the lower middle of the trams, with a smaller elegant all-caps serif subtitle beneath it reading WHERE EVERY CORNER TELLS A STORY. Add thin decorative horizontal lines around the subtitle and a tiny diamond ornament below. Keep the composition horizontal 3:2, photorealistic, slightly imperfect like a good phone snapshot, with no extra text or watermark.

entries.title: Bangkok Night Street Photography
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A street photograph capturing a young Thai woman cutting through the dense nighttime crowd on Khao San Road, Bangkok. The subject is caught mid-stride wearing a loose floral dress, expression distracted and completely natural, not performing for the camera, small crossbody bag across her shoulder. The environment is dense and chaotic: bar signs in Thai and English stacked vertically, tuk-tuks and motorbikes pressing through foot traffic, tourists and locals blending in the moving crowd around her. Lighting is messy and authentic: uneven bar fluorescent spill, LED signage scatter, occasional reflected flash from the crowd, no clean single source. Composition: full-body medium shot from slightly above eye level, subject in sharp focus in left center, surrounding crowd in natural motion blur, neon signs stretching tall in the vertical frame above. Color palette: acidic yellow, electric pink, deep orange - intense but documentary-accurate neon saturation, not stylized. Render with photographic realism: subtle film grain, avoid over-smoothed CG textures. Skin: subsurface scattering and micro-texture. Preserve authentic motion blur on background crowd, not artificial bokeh. Photorealistic rendering, no watermark.

entries.title: Cinematic Final Minute Football Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a premium 9:16 vertical split-layout social media showcase for an AI-generated football cinematic about Kylian Mbappe in a World Cup final, with the energy of a movie poster, a storyboard, and a sports broadcast graphic combined.

Canvas: Vertical poster, dark cinematic stadium atmosphere, high contrast, wet rain and sparks, gold-orange highlights, deep navy and black shadows, gritty photoreal sports photography with dramatic motion blur, lens flares, flying turf, confetti, and explosive lighting. Use a collage of angled rectangular panels on the left and bottom, separated by thin gold borders, plus one large heroic portrait panel on the right.

Main subject: A French footballer in a dark navy France kit with gold number 10, athletic build, rain-soaked skin and jersey, standing in a packed illuminated stadium at night. In the large right panel he is shown from chest up, fist pressed to his heart, stadium floodlights behind him, raindrops visible, triumphant and intense. Keep the face intentionally obscured or anonymized while preserving the iconic football-star silhouette and emotion.

Layout and counted storyboard panels: Include exactly 8 numbered cinematic moments, each with a large gold number, bold white uppercase title, and a short white subtitle. Arrange them as overlapping diagonal film-strip panels across the left half and lower half of the poster:
1. "STADIUM IGNITION" - "LIGHTS. FIRE. 80,000 HEARTS. ONE DREAM." Wide aerial stadium packed with fans and fireworks bursting above the roof.
2. "THE WALKOUT" - "NO WORDS. JUST DESTINY." Players walking through rain and tunnel light, central France number 10 silhouette leading.
3. "FIRST TOUCH" - "THE MOMENT EVERYTHING BEGINS." Extreme close-up of a boot striking or trapping a football on wet grass with spray.
4. "THE BREAKAWAY" - "SPEED. SKILL. HE CAN'T BE STOPPED." The France player sprinting past defenders with golden motion streaks.
5. "COLLISION" - "PAIN. IMPACT. NO TURNING BACK." A muddy sliding tackle and bodies crashing on the pitch.
6. "FINAL SHOT" - "ONE STRIKE. ETERNITY." Dynamic shooting pose, leg extended, ball rocketing toward goal in a stadium.
7. "THE GOAL" - "EXPLOSION. HISTORY!" Football smashing into the net with a burst of sparks and glowing impact lines.
8. "IMMORTAL" - "LEGENDS AREN'T BORN. THEY ARE MADE. IN THE FINAL MINUTE." Player sliding on knees in celebration amid gold confetti and roaring crowd.

Right-side broadcast overlay: Add a compact vertical scoreboard HUD near the upper-right edge with a small World Cup trophy icon and text "FIFA WORLD CUP QATAR 2022". Below it place a boxed label "FINAL", a large timer "89:59", an added-time line "+6", then two score rows: "FRA" with French flag and score "2", and "ARG" with Argentina flag and score "2". Beneath the scoreboard add a red audio waveform and small labels reading "CROWD NOISE LEVEL" and "MAXIMUM". Add tiny technical text below, such as "CAMERA 7", "SLOW MOTION", and "180 FPS".

Bottom title area: Across the lower center, place a massive distressed white title FINAL MINUTE in bold condensed sports typography with rough texture. Under it, add the tagline 90 MINUTES. ONE MOMENT THAT CHANGES EVERYTHING. with the words "CHANGES EVERYTHING" highlighted in gold. At the very bottom, add a tiny production credit line: CRAFTED WITH GPT IMAGE 2 + SEEDANCE 2.0.

Visual style: Premium cinematic football poster, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, dark HDR grading, shallow depth of field, rain particles, sparks, smoke, stadium floodlights, explosive gold confetti, diagonal editorial composition, crisp typography, intense motion, viral sports social-media aesthetic.

Constraints: Use exactly 8 numbered panels plus the single large heroic portrait panel. Keep all text legible, uppercase, and integrated into the design. Do not add extra storyboard numbers, extra teams, watermarks, app UI, or unrelated logos. Maintain a vertical social-media poster format and a dramatic final-minute World Cup atmosphere.
entries.description: Creates a dramatic vertical football storyboard poster with eight numbered match moments, a heroic France player portrait, and World Cup-style broadcast graphics.

entries.title: Poolside School Cleaning Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical summer snapshot of three Japanese high school girls cleaning an outdoor school swimming pool area on a bright sunny day, styled like a nostalgic candid youth magazine photo. The scene is poolside on wet concrete with the blue pool and metal fence in the background, leafy greenery and a pale blue sky with soft clouds behind them. All faces should be anonymized with soft square mosaic blur blocks, matching a privacy-blurred social-media photo. The students wear matching summer school uniforms: crisp white short-sleeve button-up shirts, navy striped neckties, and blue plaid pleated skirts, barefoot on the wet ground. Count exactly 3 students: the left student stands holding a blue garden hose spraying water onto the pavement and carries a navy shoulder bag with a small plush keychain; the center student leans forward toward the camera while scrubbing the wet concrete with a long-handled deck brush; the right student stands confidently with one hand on her hip while holding a plastic cup of bubble tea with a red straw. Include exactly 5 main cleaning/accessory items: 1 blue hose with visible splashing water, 1 long-handled brush with green bristles, 1 turquoise bucket on the right foreground, 1 white towel draped over the bucket edge, and 1 drink cup with tapioca pearls. Use natural sunlight, realistic water reflections, sparkling droplets, shallow depth of field, soft lens flare, and a small rainbow reflection near the bottom foreground. Composition should be full-body, slightly low eye-level, portrait 9:16, centered on the middle student and framed to show the poolside environment. Keep the mood wholesome, casual, cheerful, and summery; avoid text, logos, exaggerated poses, or fantasy elements.

entries.title: Underwater Forest Stream Photography
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Shot with a high-definition underwater camera, this prompt captures real underwater natural scenery in a clear shallow stream next to a tropical primeval forest.

Vertical composition, 3:4 aspect ratio, medium-to-long shot. The lens is slightly below the water surface, showing the shimmering bottom of the water surface above with realistic water wave refraction and natural reflections.

Sunlight shines diagonally into the water from the top right, forming soft beams and underwater spots. Dark reflections and shadows of large tree branches occupy part of the composition in the upper right.

In the middle is clear and quiet stream water with slight suspended particles and 5-8 native freshwater small fish swimming naturally, mainly gray-silver and light brown, varying in size and distance, not forming an organized school. On the stream bed, deep green, yellow-green, and brownish-green water plants grow naturally, swaying gently with the current, distributed naturally unlike an artificial aquarium.

The bottom consists of gray-brown fine sand, gravel, pebbles, and several naturally shaped stones with slight algae marks and signs of water erosion. Multiple springs at the bottom show fine sand billowing slowly from small holes, creating light sand clouds and local water disturbances, not white smoke, steam, or large bubbles.

Natural landscape live-action photography, high-end natural documentary feel, close to National Geographic ecological photography. Features transparent water, natural lighting, restrained colors, realistic underwater optical effects, slight graininess, natural depth of field, and high-definition details.

No people, no buildings, no artificial traces, no text, no borders, no LOGO. Avoid CG feel, aquarium look, seabed coral, exaggerated fish schools, oversaturated greens, dreamy lighting effects, or plastic water plants.

entries.title: Golden Hour Tech Rivals Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A candid low-angle photograph of two adult men standing in front of a traditional East Asian wooden building with warm brown timber framing and repeating green lattice window panels, shot during golden hour with strong warm sunlight and deep shadows. The man on the left is much closer to the camera, partially cropped, wearing a black zip-up jacket with a large white OpenAI logo on the chest and a gray panel on the sleeve. His arm is extended directly toward the lens, holding a cigarette in the extreme foreground so the hand and cigarette dominate the lower-left area and appear slightly out of focus due to shallow depth of field. The man on the right stands farther back, wearing a loose black T-shirt with a bold white "xAI" style logo on the chest, one hand raised near his mouth as if smoking or thinking. Both men have their faces obscured by smooth rectangular blur blocks, preserving anonymity. Use a realistic documentary street-photo aesthetic, natural skin tones, subtle lens distortion from a wide-angle perspective, cinematic contrast, rich sunset lighting, and a casual confrontational composition that emphasizes the brands on their clothing and the cigarette thrust toward the viewer. Include exactly 2 men, 1 cigarette visible in the foreground, 1 black jacket with the OpenAI emblem, and 1 black T-shirt with the xAI logo.

entries.title: Blurred Deer in Green Forest
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A painterly wildlife photograph with strong intentional motion blur, showing 1 deer-like animal in a lush green forest clearing. The animal stands slightly left of center in side profile facing left, with a pale tan to cream body, slender legs, and a soft indistinct head and ears, partially emerging from a dark shadowy opening in dense foliage. The entire image is heavily smeared with diagonal and vertical camera motion, creating an impressionistic, dreamlike effect rather than sharp detail. Surround the subject with saturated summer greenery: deep emerald bushes in the background, darker forest shadows near the upper left, and bright vivid grass across the foreground. Use natural outdoor daylight, rich green tones, soft contrast, and an abstract photographic style that feels like a fleeting glimpse of wildlife captured while moving. No people, no text, no buildings, no extra animals.
entries.description: This prompt generates an impressionistic motion-blurred wildlife image of a single deer-like animal in dense green foliage, suitable for atmospheric nature art or abstract photography.

entries.title: Rain-Soaked Formula Race Car Action
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic ultra-realistic motorsport action photograph of a modern Formula 1 race car in dark navy with red and yellow accents charging through heavy rain on a soaked circuit, shot from a very low trackside angle near the front-left corner of the car. The car dominates the foreground, with slick aerodynamic bodywork, exposed wet tires throwing up massive sprays of water, glowing red reflections on the wet asphalt, and sharp sponsor-style markings across the nose, front wing, sidepod, and rear wing. Capture the sensation of high speed with subtle motion blur in the background and water streaks, while keeping the car body mostly crisp and detailed. The scene takes place in a packed stadium-like racetrack with 1 main grandstand full of blurred spectators along the left side, 2 bright red illuminated signage boards in the distance, 1 safety fence running parallel to the track, and 1 reflective rain-soaked racing surface stretching toward the camera. Overhead, dense storm clouds fill the sky, creating a moody cinematic atmosphere with cold blue-gray tones contrasted by the car's vivid warm colors. Emphasize dramatic spray, reflections, realism, tension, and the feeling of a championship race in brutal weather, as if captured on a professional sports telephoto-lens camera with shallow depth of field, high contrast, and editorial motorsport photography styling.
entries.description: This prompt generates a cinematic, ultra-realistic Formula 1-style racing photo in heavy rain, ideal for sports posters, editorial visuals, and dramatic motorsport content.
